name: agenthub
description: AgentHub：面向多数字员工协作的控制中枢，连接手机网页、本地 Agent 与 WebSocket Hub

scripts.agent:echo: AGENT_ID=echo-agent AGENT_NAME='Echo Agent' AGENT_MODE=echo node agent/index.js
scripts.agent:codex: AGENT_ID=codex-agent AGENT_NAME='Codex Agent' AGENT_MODE=codex node agent/index.js
scripts.agent:openai: AGENT_ID=openai-agent AGENT_NAME='OpenAI Agent' AGENT_MODE=openai node agent/index.js
